gaps.missingSurface: Live secure-message and telephony provider dispatch or receipt infrastructure
gaps.temporaryFallback: Use the existing simulator-backed provider receipts and delivery semantics while keeping the repair kernel durable and replay-safe.
gaps.riskIfUnresolved: Provider-specific timing and receipt edge cases are not yet proven against live infrastructure.
gaps.followUpAction: Replay the 245 repair and rebound flows against the live provider adapters before production signoff.

gaps.missingSurface: Live upstream demographic or preference drift subscriptions
gaps.temporaryFallback: Represent drift through authoritative appended observations such as preference_change and demographic_change.
gaps.riskIfUnresolved: Some route drift enters the repair chain later than it would under a fully subscribed upstream feed.
gaps.followUpAction: Bind PDS or preference-feed change signals directly into the same observation seam instead of adding a parallel repair path.
